titleStmt.title: SII 5.992: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 992. (A.R. No. 127 of 1896). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE ARULALESVARA SHRINE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pumevu vaḷartirup poṉmārvu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalamperitu ciṟappa vicaiyamāmakaḷ velpuyattiruppa Icaiyuñ celviyu meṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca niṇila
maṭantaiyait tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar taruma maṇimuṭi tavitteṉa maṇimuṭi cūṭi mallaiñālattum palluyirk kellām Ellaiyi liṉpa miyalpiṉi leyti veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅko lo
cci vāḻi pallūḻi Āḻi naṭappac cempoṉ virasi ṅhāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecarivaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yā
ṇṭu nālāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrk koṭṭattut taṉiyūr śrīmaturāntakaccaruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsa paiyom Eḻuttu nammur Akaḷaṅki- śva ramuṭaiya mahāde var kanmikaḷum śrīmāhe
śva rak kaṇkāṇiceyvārkaḷuṅ kaṇṭu Ivvūrt talappāṭakam viracoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku 1- kkaṇṇāṟṟu viranārāyaṇavatikkuk kiḻakku Oṉpatāñ caturattup paka 2- m pattāñ caturattu paka 3- m Ākap paka 5- m ItdeThe inscription stops with this.
Digital edition of SII 5.992 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
